narrative:
Wood County has 87,602 registered voters, with 55.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.8%, a modest Republican lean of 4.9 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 27.0% of registrants.
